style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. A large shield outline containing a neat checklist of ten rows: A01 ACCESS CONTROL — RBAC; A02 CRYPTO — RS256 + HASH; A03 INJECTION — PARAMETERIZED SQL; A04 INSECURE DESIGN — CSRF BY DEFAULT; A05 MISCONFIG — STRICT HEADERS; A06 COMPONENTS — PINNED DEPS; A07 AUTH — SHORT TOKENS; A08 INTEGRITY — VERIFIED SIGNATURES; A09 LOGGING — AUDIT TRAIL; A10 SSRF — FLAGGED. Rows A01 through A09 each have a small navy check mark; A10 has a small rust tag reading N/A. Title above the shield reads OWASP TOP 10 · ASVS LEVEL 2. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. A large shield outline containing a neat checklist of ten rows: A01 ACCESS CONTROL — RBAC; A02 CRYPTO — RS256 + HASH; A03 INJECTION — PARAMETERIZED SQL; A04 INSECURE DESIGN — CSRF BY DEFAULT; A05 MISCONFIG — STRICT HEADERS; A06 COMPONENTS — PINNED DEPS; A07 AUTH — SHORT TOKENS; A08 INTEGRITY — VERIFIED SIGNATURES; A09 LOGGING — AUDIT TRAIL; A10 SSRF — FLAGGED.
